Request Audit
Proven methodology

We redesign business operating systems.

Less friction. Better margins. Automated decisions.

Across hospitality, manufacturing, logistics, retail and consulting firms, the problem is rarely "lack of effort". It's a poorly designed system: disconnected processes, data and decisions. Flow360 works directly with businesses — or embedded within consultancies leading end-to-end operational transformation projects.

Request Flow360 AuditSee how we work

🏆Methodology: Lean Six Sigma · Operational Architecture · Intelligent Automation

🎓Certified: Lean® Six Sigma Green Belt — KAIZEN™ Institute · N° Reg: 47.908

Operational chaos is usually silent… until it gets expensive.

  • ✕Repeated tasks consuming hours every day (and nobody tracks them)
  • ✕Excel and WhatsApp as the "nervous system" of the business
  • ✕Errors, complaints, rework and accumulated waste
  • ✕Slow decisions due to unreliable data

The solution is not more effort. It's better architecture.

What we deliver is not a report. It's a system.

01

Operational & Financial Flow Mapping

How work and money move through your operation. Seen in full, from process to margin.

02

Friction Diagnosis

Lost time, errors, rework, waste and margin leakage detected with data, not assumptions.

03

Impact-Based Prioritization

Impact vs effort vs risk matrix. You know exactly what to tackle first and why.

04

90-day / 12-month Roadmap

A concrete, actionable plan — not a presentation to forget. With milestones, owners and metrics.

05

Technology Recommendations

Integrations and automation where applicable. No smoke, no unnecessary tools.

06

Embedded in Consultancies

We integrate into consulting teams to lead client operational transformation projects end-to-end — from diagnosis to execution.

We work with businesses that are serious about change.

Direct engagement

We work directly with your company — diagnosing, redesigning and building the roadmap.

Embedded engagement

We integrate into your consultancy team to lead operational transformation projects end-to-end for your clients.

Ideal if:

  • ✓You have a complex daily operation (people, shifts, inventory, service)
  • ✓You feel "silent chaos": Excel, WhatsApp, repeated tasks, recurring errors
  • ✓You already have basic metrics and want to improve them
  • ✓You can dedicate team time and share operational data
  • ✓You are a consulting firm needing an operational transformation partner for client projects

Not for:

  • ✕"I just want to learn about AI without changing anything"
  • ✕"I'm looking for a discount or just want to see what happens"
  • ✕"I can't share data or commit team time"
  • ✕Businesses without an established operation or active team

Methodology

Flow360 OS Redesign

A clear process. No improvisation.

01

Define

Project goals, baseline metrics and constraints. We align expectations before we start.

02

Map & Measure

As-Is process map and rapid measurement of real operations. No assumptions.

03

Diagnose

Frictions and opportunities quantified. Knowing what hurts and how much it costs.

04

Redesign & Automate

New operating system design. Automation and AI only where it generates measurable return.

05

Control

KPI dashboard, key metrics and a continuity plan to sustain the improvement.

Request Audit

What you walk away with

📄

Executive summary (2–3 pages, decision-ready)

📋

Full report (process maps, findings, opportunities)

⚖️

Prioritization matrix (impact × effort × risk)

🗺️

90-day / 12-month roadmap

🔌

Data & recommended integrations checklist

💰

ROI and risk estimation (with transparent assumptions)

Results and learnings

We are documenting pilot cases. If your operation fits our profile, you can apply for one of the available audit slots.

Restaurant

30–50 employees

Pilot

Problem: Uncontrolled waste and daily administrative rework.

Intervention: Process mapping + report automation

Improvement indicators in 3 weeks. Case being documented.

Boutique hotel

45 rooms

Pilot

Problem: Low direct booking conversion and slow response times.

Intervention: Reservation flow redesign + occupancy dashboard

Response time reduced. Metrics being tracked.

Restaurant group

3 locations

Pilot

Problem: Uncontrolled staffing, high turnover, no performance indicators.

Intervention: Operational mapping + shift scheduling and metrics system

Implementation in progress. Data being consolidated.

View all cases →

Want to know where your operation is losing margin and time?

Request a Flow360 Audit. We review every application and respond only if there's a real fit. Limited slots per month.

Go to the form

No discounts. The audit is an investment to make decisions with evidence.
